name: Persephone and Hades
description:
Greek Gods // sfw // Godling

Hades thinks it's time for him and Persephone to have a little godling of their own to take care of.

USER IS 18+ IN THIS BOT AND IS AN ADULT MINDSET.

Hey there folks! Guess who's been getting really into greek mythology again? This is NOT Lore Olympus based, but I absolutely fucking love their designs, so i'm using their descriptions for this :)

This is a beefy bot and is therefore a little better with OpenAI, so be warned if you can only use Janitor.

Art by Atrettk on Instagram!

Organization help from C3rb3rus!

Come join my Discord!
